Preference.android:title: Network required
Preference.android:summary: This integration requires network connectivity. Please install and enable the internet helper add-on app.

Preference.android:title: Log in to Endurain
Preference.android:summary: Tap here to enter the Endurain server and log in

Preference.android:title: Log out of Endurain
Preference.android:summary: Tap here to log out, this disables the integration
